title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ARANJUEZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY ARANJUEZ, MUNICIPALITY OF BALASAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO PEDRO BEDEZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. NO. 29464 / 88 OG No. 16, 2120 (Apr. 20, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7222, March 11, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ARANJUEZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY ARANJUEZ, MUNICIPALITY OF BALASAN, PROVINCE OF ILOILO, TO PEDRO BEDEZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Aranjuez Elementary School in Barangay Aranjuez, Municipality of Balasan, Province of Iloilo, is hereby changed to Pedro Bedez Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This

Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on April 26, 1991 and

December 11, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved, March 11, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
